Title: DELETE
Description:
Remove data row(s) from an existing table. If the optional WHERE clause is specified only the rows
which match the condition(s) are removed.
Examples:
[ WITH
cte_alias
AS '('
SELECT_query
')'
  [,
cte_alias
AS '('
SELECT_query
')'] [, ... ] ]
   DELETE FROM [
schema_name
'.' ]
table_name
[ [ AS ]
table_alias
]
     [ WHERE
condition_expression
]
